Name: update_departments_many
SQL: WITH mutation_result_0 AS (UPDATE "public"."departments" SET "description" = $1::text WHERE departments."id" = $2::uuid AND (departments."id" = ANY($3::uuid[])) RETURNING *) SELECT jsonb_build_array((SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result_0), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result_0."id" AS "id", mutation_result_0."name" AS "name", mutation_result_0."description" AS "description" FROM mutation_result_0) AS "_e"))))
